themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 7 verses. Commentary leans on "Gregory the Dialogist on Morals on the Book of Job, Book XVI: If the morning suddenly appear,...". Cross references echo "Light".

themes.label: Provision
themes.summary: This chapter emphasizes God’s supplying care, nourishment, sufficiency, or generous provision. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 7 verses. Commentary leans on "Gregory the Dialogist on Morals on the Book of Job, Book XVI: Others as wild asses in the des...". Word-study detail reinforces "מַ֝חְסֶ֗ה: for want of a shelter - a shelter (literally or figuratively)".
